title: Linai's Starry City Night
description: Linai drifts through a glowing city night, meeting a robot and an angel along the way.

acts.approachText: Floating through the glittering city streets, Linai spots a lone robot standing beneath a flickering streetlamp between tall buildings. Its chest panel blinks with blinking amber lights and its head rotates slowly, scanning the empty avenue. Linai's internal sparkles brighten with curiosity — she has never seen anything quite so mechanical and precise. She drifts closer, her glow warming to a soft gold, and considers how to say hello to something that runs on circuits instead of feelings.

choices.label: Pulse bright light at the robot
choices.outcomeText: Linai surges forward and releases a sudden brilliant flash of energy directly at the robot's optical sensors. The robot freezes, its amber lights spinning into a confused red spiral, and it begins marching in tight circles, bumping gently into a trash can with a hollow clang. Linai contracts with a wince, her internal patterns flickering into tiny apologetic squiggles. She drifts back and glances toward the viewer with wide, flat eyes — that was definitely too much.

choices.label: Drift close and glow softly
choices.outcomeText: Linai eases forward slowly, dimming her glow to a gentle, warm pulse — the ecto-cloud equivalent of a quiet wave. The robot's head rotates toward her, its amber lights shifting to a calm, steady blue. A small hatch on its chest opens and a tiny speaker emits a soft, melodic beep sequence. Linai's body expands with delight, her internal sparkles swirling into a joyful constellation. The two hover and beep together under the city lights, a perfectly unlikely friendship formed in the glow of a starry night.

acts.approachText: Linai drifts upward through the cool night air, rising above the rooftops until she settles onto a wide flat roof overlooking the glowing city below. There, perched on the edge of a low parapet, sits an angel — soft white wings folded gently, a faint halo casting a warm circle of gold above their head, eyes gazing quietly at the stars. The angel has not noticed Linai yet. Linai's body softens and expands slowly, her glow becoming cleaner and calmer, her internal patterns simplifying into gentle swirls. She is struck by the beauty of the moment and drifts closer by degrees, unsure whether to interrupt the stillness.

choices.label: Surge up and glow as bright as possible
choices.outcomeText: Linai surges upward and blazes with her fullest, most intense glow, flooding the rooftop in brilliant white-blue light. The angel startles, wings snapping open wide with a great whoosh of feathers, and leaps into the sky with a surprised yelp — halo spinning lopsided. Linai deflates instantly, her glow dimming to a sheepish flicker, her vapor trails drooping. She watches the angel circle nervously overhead and turns both eyes toward the viewer with a long, flat stare. Too much, too fast, too bright.

choices.label: Settle nearby and glow gently
choices.outcomeText: Linai drifts down softly and settles a little distance from the angel, letting her glow become a quiet, warm shimmer — barely brighter than the halo itself. The angel turns slowly, eyes widening with gentle surprise, and then smiles. They shift to make room on the parapet's edge. Linai floats beside them, and together they look out over the city of lights below and the stars above. Linai's internal patterns bloom into tiny sparkles and soft swirling hearts. The city hums far below. The night feels enormous and kind, and neither of them needs to say a single word.
